title: Ability to change default main workspace
excerpt: we have users from different departments in our instance and the main workspace is getting crowded with folders and boards, it would be nice to allow each department to have their own default workspace.

posts.author: may.lor (May Lor)
posts.cookedHtml: we have users from different departments in our instance and the main workspace is getting crowded with folders and boards, it would be nice to allow each department to have their own default workspace.
